ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was listed on the exchange */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the initial public offering (IPO) */,
  "delisted_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was delisted from the exchange (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("exchange") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("name")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades for the day */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for corporate actions */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours (e.g., 9:30 AM - 4:00 PM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_price_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the historical price record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades for the day */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for corporate actions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "ex_dividend_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock goes ex-dividend */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date of record for dividend eligibility */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the dividend is paid */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend per share */,
  "dividend_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of dividend payments (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_dividends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock split record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "split_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock split */,
  "split_ratio" TEXT /* Ratio of the stock split (e.g., 2:1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_splits_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the performance period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the performance period */,
  "return_percentage" REAL /* Percentage return over the period */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the stock over the period */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the stock over the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_performance_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the news article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_analyst_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst providing the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date of the rating */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the analyst (e.g., Buy, Hold, Sell) */,
  "target_price" REAL /* Target price for the stock */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation provided by the analyst (e.g., Overweight, Underweight) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_analyst_ratings_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_analyst_ratings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst */,
  "firm" TEXT /* Firm where the analyst works */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)
